hero.name: Siska Riefelyna
hero.title: AI & Data Science Professional
hero.subtitle: From Mechanical Engineering to AI — bridging disciplines with data-driven innovation

about.title: About Me
about.text: Holder of a Master's degree in Artificial Intelligence for Business Transformation from SKEMA, with a diverse background in engineering, data science, teaching, and research. This provides deep understanding of enterprise needs and varied client requirements. Experience as an R&D engineer, IT engineer, and data scientist has strengthened autonomy and business/IT competencies. Currently seeking opportunities in commerce, data, and AI fields with a passion for leveraging data to inform strategic decisions and developing predictive models for organizational success.

degrees.degree: MSc Artificial Intelligence for Business Transformation

degrees.thesis: Structural Uncertainty Identification Using Mode Shape Information

positions.description: Developed data-driven solutions for an EdTech startup, including automated content qualification through RSS feed acquisition, transcription, categorization, and competency level determination using NLP and Machine Learning.
Managed IT infrastructure and provided technical support across the university. Developed and maintained systems for academic and research computing needs.
Provided IT support for academic departments. Assisted with hardware and software deployment, troubleshooting, and user training for university staff and students.
Assisted in teaching mechanical engineering courses. Conducted tutorials, graded assignments, and provided academic support to undergraduate students.
Conducted research and development in mechanical engineering. Applied advanced analytical methods and simulations for product development and optimization.
Taught undergraduate mechanical engineering courses. Developed curricula, conducted research, and mentored students in their academic and professional development.

items.name: Automated Content Qualification
items.description: Automated qualification through RSS feed acquisition, transcription, categorization by themes, and competency level determination using NLP and ML.

items.name: Insurance Data Analysis
items.description: Analyzed insurance data to identify key performance indicators (KPIs) for determining customer pricing strategies.

items.name: PCA Model — French Elections 2021
items.description: Created a PCA model to analyze French election data and determine contributing factors by province.

items.name: Sales Forecasting Model
items.description: Developed a prediction model based on historical sales data to forecast future product sales.

items.name: Financial Sentiment Analysis (NLP)
items.description: Developed an NLP model for sentiment analysis of financial tweets to gauge market sentiment.

items.name: Customer Retention Analysis
items.description: Conducted retention analysis for banking clients to identify churn factors and improve customer loyalty.

items.name: Movie Recommendation System
items.description: Designed a recommendation system for users to choose films based on preferences on an OTT platform.

items.name: McDonald's Nutritional Analysis
items.description: Analyzed menu nutritional scores to create a customer recommendation model for healthier choices.

items.name: Frenchbee Airline Market Analysis
items.description: Performed market analysis and developed a digital strategy portfolio for the airline.

items.name: P&G Risk Management Portfolio
items.description: Created a risk management portfolio for Procter & Gamble using data-driven methodologies.

items.name: DUPALF
items.description: University Diploma in Applied Phonetics for French Language

items.name: DELF B2
items.description: Diploma of French as a Foreign Language — Level B2
